purpose: Public-safe schema for applying admitted claim templates to reviewer or author claim-intake rows.

fields.name: intake_id
fields.description: Stable identifier for the claim-intake example.

fields.name: actor
fields.description: Who is using the intake row.

fields.name: template_id
fields.description: Claim-template admission id, or an unknown id for fail-closed tests.

fields.name: intended_use
fields.description: Where the submitted claim would be used.

fields.name: expected_decision
fields.description: Expected intake decision for the public example.

fields.name: expected_output_hint
fields.description: Short expected output or boundary hint.
